de.uka.ilkd.key.proof_references

Class ProofReferenceUtil

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof_references.ProofReferenceUtil

  • public final class ProofReferenceUtil
extends Object

    This class provides static methods to compute proof references. A proof reference is a source code member used during proof like methods, instance or class variables or operation contracts.

    A found proof reference is an instance of IProofReference.

    Proof references are computed for each Node separately based on the applied rule. Instances of IProofReferencesAnalyst are used to implement the rule specific extraction of such references.

    This functionality is used by the Eclipse Projects like Visual DbC.

    Author:
    Martin Hentschel
    See Also:
    IProofReference, IProofReferencesAnalyst.

    • Field Detail

      • DEFAULT_ANALYSTS

        public static final ImmutableList<IProofReferencesAnalyst> DEFAULT_ANALYSTS

    • Constructor Detail

      • ProofReferenceUtil

        private ProofReferenceUtil()

    • Method Detail

      • computeProofReferences

        public static LinkedHashSet<IProofReference<?>> computeProofReferences(Proof proof)

        Computes all proof references in the given Proof by iterating over all Nodes in breath first order.

        Changes during computation of the proof tree are not detected and should be avoided. Otherwise it is possible that the result is wrong.

        Parameters:
        proof - The Proof to compute its references.
        Returns:
        The found IProofReferences.

      • computeProofReferences

        public static LinkedHashSet<IProofReference<?>> computeProofReferences(Proof proof,
                                                                       ImmutableList<IProofReferencesAnalyst> analysts)

        Computes all proof references in the given Proof by iterating over all Nodes in breath first order.

        Changes during computation of the proof tree are not detected and should be avoided. Otherwise it is possible that the result is wrong.

        Parameters:
        proof - The Proof to compute its references.
        analysts - The IProofReferencesAnalyst to use.
        Returns:
        The found IProofReferences.

      • computeProofReferences

        public static LinkedHashSet<IProofReference<?>> computeProofReferences(Node node,
                                                                       Services services)
        Computes the IProofReference of the given Node.
        Parameters:
        node - The Node to compute its IProofReferences.
        services - The Services to use.
        Returns:
        The found IProofReferences.

      • computeProofReferences

        public static LinkedHashSet<IProofReference<?>> computeProofReferences(Node node,
                                                                       Services services,
                                                                       ImmutableList<IProofReferencesAnalyst> analysts)
        Computes the IProofReference of the given Node.
        Parameters:
        node - The Node to compute its IProofReferences.
        services - The Services to use.
        analysts - The IProofReferencesAnalyst to use.
        Returns:
        The found IProofReferences.

      • merge

        public static void merge(LinkedHashSet<IProofReference<?>> target,
                         LinkedHashSet<IProofReference<?>> toAdd)
        Merges the IProofReferences to add into the target.
        Parameters:
        target - The target to add to.
        toAdd - The IProofReferences to add.

      • merge

                         IProofReference<?> reference)
